$comment: Defensive typing constraints: type resists, type-chart coverage (marilland), and a defensive Tera check. Atoms: typeEffectiveness (defending, withTera), type. Assertions: count, coverage (values group).
name: Defensive typing

tests.title: At least one Water resist
tests.rationale: Defensive multiplier of incoming Water <= 0.5x (a resist) on >=1 member.

tests.title: At least 2 Water resists
tests.rationale: Same predicate, threshold 2 — the 'multiple water resistances' constraint.

tests.title: A Steel or Fairy type for Dragon STABs
tests.rationale: Demonstrates the `type` atom (member IS one of these types).

tests.title: Every attacking type resisted by someone (marilland)
tests.rationale: Coverage over the 18 types; $each binds to each type. The report's `uncovered` list is the marilland gap.

tests.title: Someone can become Ground-immune via Tera Flying
tests.rationale: Defensive Tera check: with the Tera type active, incoming Ground is 0x. Uses withTera + the immunity expressed as effectiveness 0.
